detail.title: Standard Bath & Dry
detail.summary: A professional 5-step bath and dry process that keeps pets clean, fresh and relaxed. We use gentle shampoo products that are safe for sensitive skin.
detail.certifiedNote: Service performed by certified grooming specialists.

gallery.heroAlt: Happy dog being gently bathed in a clean grooming salon

check.title: Step 1: Skin and coat check
check.description: Our specialist checks the skin and coat condition to choose the most suitable shampoo and spot potential skin issues early.

bath.title: Step 2: Relaxing massage bath
bath.description: Deep cleansing removes dirt and oil with two rounds of professional shampoo, combined with gentle massage for relaxation.

dry.title: Step 3: Drying and fluff brushing
dry.description: Professional drying equipment keeps the coat dry from the roots, fluffy and smooth, helping prevent skin fungus.

ear.title: Step 4: Ear hygiene
ear.description: Ears are cleaned with professional solution, with ear hair removal when needed to reduce odor and infection risk.

nail.title: Step 5: Nail trimming and filing
nail.description: Nails are trimmed and smoothed so pets avoid scratching themselves and household furniture.

parasite.title: Parasite removal
parasite.description: Helps remove ticks, fleas and hidden dirt from the coat.

odor.title: Odor reduction
odor.description: Removes unpleasant smell and keeps a fresh scent for days.

comfort.title: Pet comfort
comfort.description: Massage helps reduce stress so pets feel happier and more active.

pricing.title: Detailed pricing
pricing.note: Prices apply to short coats. Long or heavily tangled coats may include an extra detangling fee from 50k-100k depending on condition.

related.title: Related services
related.subtitle: Explore more complete care services for your pet.

nguyenHuy.name: Nguyen Huy
nguyenHuy.content: The service was excellent. The staff were enthusiastic and took very careful care of my pet. After bathing, the coat was fragrant and smooth.

minhTu.name: Minh Tu
minhTu.content: Reasonable price for a professional 5-step bath and dry process. My pet is afraid of water but the groomers handled everything very gently.
